calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS -
DEFENDANT VICTOR EMEONYE'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. =(301/JLW/) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the PJ. for Court trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing on this day.
Dept. 218, Comm: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Paul Arshawsky, Esq. for Plaintiff: Emerald Fund, Inc. Plaintiff's witness: Vykky Gamble, was sworn and examined. No appearance by Defendant, Victor Emeonye.
Exhibit 1--- Lease Agreement----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2--- Amendment to Lease -----------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---3-day Notice---------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Victor Emeonye as follows:
Restitution and possession of premises located at 1045 Mission Street #253, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of lease.
Past due rent: $369.00
Holdover damages: $196.00
Costs: $320.00
for a total of $885.00
Counsel stipulated to the return of Exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: PAUL ARSHAWSKY, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY RUDY BALDERAMA, ESQ. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT. THERE IS NO APPEARANCE THIS DAY BY DEFENDANT VICTOR EMEONYE; THE MATTER IS ORDERED OFF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR THIS DAY; TRIAL DATE OF MONDAY, APR-17-2006 IN D-206 REMAINS.

COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (218).
